title: Travis: The True Story of Travis Walton
original_title: Travis: The True Story of Travis Walton
overview: One of the most significant UFO events in history -- Travis Walton's 1975 UFO experience comes alive in this 90-minute documentary. His trauma and transition after a mysterious beam of light strikes him unconscious.
